methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.AliyunRosStackProperties.__init__
documentation:
Artifact properties for ROS stacks.

```
param template_file

A file relative to the assembly root which contains the ROS template for this stack.

param parameters

Values for ROS stack parameters that should be passed when the stack is deployed.

param stack_name

The name to use for the ROS stack. Default: - name derived from artifact ID
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.AliyunRosStackProperties.template_file
documentation: A file relative to the assembly root which contains the ROS template for this stack.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.AliyunRosStackProperties.parameters
documentation: Values for ROS stack parameters that should be passed when the stack is deployed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.AliyunRosStackProperties.stack_name
documentation:
The name to use for the ROS stack.

:default: - name derived from artifact ID

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.AssemblyBuildOptions.__init__
documentation:
---
param runtime_info: 'Include the specified runtime information (module versions) in
  manifest. Default: - if this option is not specified, runtime info will not be included'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.AssemblyBuildOptions.runtime_info
documentation:
Include the specified runtime information (module versions) in manifest.

:default: - if this option is not specified, runtime info will not be included

classes.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudArtifact

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudArtifact.__init__
documentation:
---
param assembly: '-'
param dependencies: 'IDs of artifacts that must be deployed before this artifact.
  Default: - no dependencies.'
param id: '-'
param metadata: 'Associated metadata. Default: - no metadata.'
param properties: 'The set of properties for this artifact (depends on type). Default:
  - no properties.'
param type: The type of artifact.
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudArtifact.from_manifest
documentation:
Returns a subclass of `CloudArtifact` based on the artifact type defined in the artifact manifest.

```
param assembly

The cloud assembly from which to load the artifact.

param id

The artifact ID.

param type

The type of artifact.

param dependencies

IDs of artifacts that must be deployed before this artifact. Default: - no dependencies.

param metadata

Associated metadata. Default: - no metadata.

param properties

The set of properties for this artifact (depends on type). Default: - no properties.

return

the CloudArtifact that matches the artifact type or undefined if it's an artifact type that is unrecognized by this module.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudArtifact.find_metadata_by_type
documentation:
---
param type: '-'
return: all the metadata entries of a specific type in this artifact.
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudArtifact.manifest
documentation: The artifact's manifest.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudArtifact.messages
documentation: The set of messages extracted from the artifact's metadata.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudArtifact.dependencies
documentation: Returns all the artifacts that this artifact depends on.
Represents an artifact within a cloud assembly.

classes.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.__init__
documentation:
Reads a cloud assembly from the specified directory.

```
param directory

The root directory of the assembly.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.get_nested_assembly
documentation:
Returns a nested assembly.

```
param artifact_id

The artifact ID of the nested assembly.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.get_nested_assembly_artifact
documentation:
Returns a nested assembly artifact.

```
param artifact_id

The artifact ID of the nested assembly.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.get_stack
documentation:
Returns a ROS stack artifact by name from this assembly.

Deprecated renamed to 'getStackByName' (or 'getStackArtifact(id)')

```
param stack_name

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.get_stack_artifact
documentation:
Returns a ROS stack artifact from this assembly.

Param artifactId the artifact id of the stack (can be obtained through 'stack.artifactId').
Throws if there is no stack artifact with that id
Returns a 'RosStackArtifact' object.

```
param artifact_id

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.get_stack_by_name
documentation:
Returns a ROS stack artifact from this assembly.

Will only search the current assembly.

Param stackName the name of the ROS stack.
Throws if there is no stack artifact by that name
Throws if there is more than one stack with the same stack name. You can
use 'getStackArtifact - stack.artifactId' instead.
Returns a 'RosStackArtifact' object.

```
param stack_name

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.tree
documentation:
Returns the tree metadata artifact from this assembly.

Throws if there is no metadata artifact by that name
Returns a 'TreeCloudArtifact' object if there is one defined in the manifest, 'undefined' otherwise.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.try_get_artifact
documentation:
Attempts to find an artifact with a specific identity.

Returns A 'CloudArtifact' object or 'undefined' if the artifact does not exist in this assembly.
Param id The artifact ID

```
param id

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.artifacts
documentation: All artifacts included in this assembly.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.directory
documentation: The root directory of the cloud assembly.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.manifest
documentation: The raw assembly manifest.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.runtime
documentation: Runtime information such as module versions used to synthesize this assembly.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.stacks
documentation:
---
return: all the ROS stack artifacts that are included in this assembly.
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssembly.version
documentation: The schema version of the assembly manifest.
Represents a deployable cloud application.

classes.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssemblyBuilder

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssemblyBuilder.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a cloud assembly builder.

```
param outdir

The output directory, uses temporary directory if undefined.

param asset_outdir

Use the given asset output directory. Default: - Same as the manifest outdir

param parent_builder

If this builder is for a nested assembly, the parent assembly builder. Default: - This is a root assembly
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssemblyBuilder.add_artifact
documentation:
Adds an artifact into the cloud assembly.

```
param id

The ID of the artifact.

param type

The type of artifact.

param dependencies

IDs of artifacts that must be deployed before this artifact. Default: - no dependencies.

param metadata

Associated metadata. Default: - no metadata.

param properties

The set of properties for this artifact (depends on type). Default: - no properties.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssemblyBuilder.add_missing
documentation:
Reports that some context is missing in order for this cloud assembly to be fully synthesized.

```
param key

The missing context key.

param props

A set of provider-specific options.

param provider

The provider from which we expect this context key to be obtained.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssemblyBuilder.build_assembly
documentation:
Finalizes the cloud assembly into the output directory returns a 'CloudAssembly' object that can be used to inspect the assembly.

```
param runtime_info

Include the specified runtime information (module versions) in manifest. Default: - if this option is not specified, runtime info will not be included
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssemblyBuilder.create_nested_assembly
documentation:
Creates a nested cloud assembly.

```
param artifact_id



param display_name

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssemblyBuilder.asset_outdir
documentation: The directory where assets of this Cloud Assembly should be stored.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssemblyBuilder.outdir
documentation: The root directory of the resulting cloud assembly.
Can be used to build a cloud assembly.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssemblyBuilderProps.__init__
documentation:
Construction properties for CloudAssemblyBuilder.

```
param asset_outdir

Use the given asset output directory. Default: - Same as the manifest outdir

param parent_builder

If this builder is for a nested assembly, the parent assembly builder. Default: - This is a root assembly
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssemblyBuilderProps.asset_outdir
documentation:
Use the given asset output directory.

:default: - Same as the manifest outdir

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.CloudAssemblyBuilderProps.parent_builder
documentation:
If this builder is for a nested assembly, the parent assembly builder.

:default: - This is a root assembly

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.Environment.__init__
documentation:
Models an ALIYUN execution environment, for use within the CDK toolkit.

```
param account

The ALIYUN account this environment deploys into.

param name

The arbitrary name of this environment (user-set, or at least user-meaningful).

param region

The ALIYUN region name where this environment deploys into.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.Environment.account
documentation: The ALIYUN account this environment deploys into.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.Environment.name
documentation: The arbitrary name of this environment (user-set, or at least user-meaningful).

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.Environment.region
documentation: The ALIYUN region name where this environment deploys into.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.EnvironmentPlaceholders.CURRENT_ACCOUNT

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.EnvironmentPlaceholders.CURRENT_REGION
documentation: Insert this into the destination fields to be replaced with the current region.

Placeholders which can be used manifests.

These can occur both in the Asset Manifest as well as the general
Cloud Assembly manifest.

This is necessary because its used as an input in the stable

```
The type of the metadata entry.

param data

The data. Default: - no data.

param trace

A stack trace for when the entry was created. Default: - no trace.

see

core.ConstructNode.metadata

stability

deprecated

alicloud

/ros-cdk-core library.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cxapi.RosStackArtifact.display_name
documentation:
A string that represents this stack.

Should only be used in user interfaces.
If the stackName and artifactId are the same, it will just return that. Otherwise,
it will return something like " ()"
